effect.interpretation: No statistically clear effect: match hours look like weather-comparable days. A null result is still a real finding. With n=35 days, only effects of about 2.2 ct/kWh or larger were detectable (80% power), so this rules out a large effect, not any effect.
effect.t_caveat: per-day deltas share control days (pool smaller than the match-day count), so they are positively correlated and this t is optimistic

robustness_within_day.note: within-day contrast (match hours minus same-day non-match hours), match day vs weather-matched controls; nets out the day-level seasonal drift the main estimate inherits

effect.interpretation: No statistically clear effect: match hours look like weather-comparable days. A null result is still a real finding. With n=4 days, only effects of about 6.7 ct/kWh or larger were detectable (80% power), so this rules out a large effect, not any effect.

robustness_within_day.note: within-day contrast (match hours minus same-day non-match hours), match day vs weather-matched controls; nets out the day-level seasonal drift the main estimate inherits

germany.note: matches with Germany playing, from the label column of wc_matches.csv; the single best-followed team, so the best-powered single event despite the small n
